violations.text: Milk and hot dogs observed held at 48-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All TCS foods in refrigerator disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
Cold-holding unit observed in poor repair, not holding food at 41 degrees F or above. PIC stated a work order was placed on 4/26/2025. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023

The floors especially beneath market shelves and in the back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023
Ceiling tiles in the market are in poor repair, with stains from previous water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
